title: System expert (fire alarm systems)
salary_range: salary and good employment benefits - A profess
meta_description: Join ARE as a System Expert (Fire Alarm Systems) in Turku; manage fire alarm project management from start to finish. A versatile position within our growing
description: Are you passionate about fire safety technology? As a System Expert (Fire Alarm Systems) at ARE, you'll join our family-owned company that has been building sustainable societies since 100 years ago. We're looking for an expert to manage comprehensive fire alarm project management from start to finish. This role combines field and office work, offering a versatile and responsible position within our growing industry. With experience in Schneider, Hedengren, Panasonic, or Eltek systems, you'll be part of a team dedicated to ensuring pleasant conditions for end users. Our real estate services include building maintenance and modernization projects for shopping centers, hotels, and offices.
what_we_expect: Appropriate technical training (e.g. Electrical or automation)
Experience with fire alarm equipment or similar systems
Good organizational and project management skills
Customer-oriented approach and good interaction skills
Ability to work independently and in a team
Willingness to move around construction sites
job_responsibilities: Office work: Financial monitoring and budgeting of projects
Customer cooperation and communication with stakeholders
Field work: Programming and commissioning of fire alarm equipment
Project and installation work at sites
what_we_offer: A versatile and responsible role in a growing industry
The opportunity to develop your skills as an expert in the field
Competitive salary and good employment benefits
A professional and supportive work community
search_keywords: fire alarm systems, real estate services, maintenance, programming, Schneider, Hedengren, Panasonic, Eltek, customer properties, energy efficiency, indoor conditions, building technology, Finnish family business, over a hundred years of experience

title: Sales Manager, Defense
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: Join Valmet Automotive Oyj as a Sales Manager, Defense - Lead growth opportunities with our expanding defense business area. Experience in B2B or B2G sales
description: We are seeking a Sales Manager, Defense to lead our growing business area in the defense sector. This role requires you to build and shape new opportunities from scratch by understanding customer needs and creating tailored solutions. You will collaborate with other departments to develop a forward-thinking sales strategy and work closely with key stakeholders to expand our presence in the industry. With experience in B2B or B2G sales, exposure to defense sector stakeholders is preferred. Strong communication skills in Finnish and English are essential, as well as an ability to simplify complex technical concepts for diverse audiences.
what_we_expect: Previous sales experience but will have room to grow in this role to be a professional in solution selling
Curious, able to create tailored solutions for our customers and capable to understand the defense sectors decision-making frameworks
Key-responsibilities
job_responsibilities: Drive new business by identifying high-potential customers, understanding their operational and technical requirements, and turning those needs into tailored solutions, strong value propositions, and long-term partnerships that support sustainable growth.

Be a trusted advisor and ambassador in a growth-driven transformation, where our automotive expertise is expanded into new industrial sectors strengthening our presence and relationships with key defense stakeholders.
Participate developing and executing a scalable, forward-thinking sales strategy in collaboration with marketing and sales development, laying the foundation for a robust Defense sales function.
what_we_offer: An ePassi benefit that can be used for sports, culture, and wellbeing services
Free access to our Harrastetalo Laturi activity center, which offers gym and workout facilities, free group exercise classes, and a golf simulator
search_keywords: sales manager defense, sales manager jobs, defense sales manager, sales manager position, sales manager job description

title: Combination vehicle driver

meta_description: YES Your Excellent Staff Oy is seeking a Combination vehicle driver Oulu in Kempele, Oulu, Liminka, Tyrnävä, Muhos. We are seeking a combination vehicle driver
description: We are seeking a combination vehicle driver to deliver goods to the Oulu economic area during summer deliveries! The ideal candidate will have a valid CE driver's license, digital plotter card, professional qualification, experience driving a combination vehicle, an independent and responsible work approach, good physical condition, and a customer service mentality. We offer competitive salaries and bonuses according to TES, excellent tools and safe equipment, a fair and open work atmosphere, and support from a professional team. If you're ready for the opportunity, apply today by leaving your contact information and skills via the application form below.
what_we_expect: Valid CE driver's license
Digital plotter card and valid professional qualification
Experience driving a combination vehicle
Independent and responsible approach to work
Good physical condition and customer service mentality
job_responsibilities: Transport individual or bulk goods on routes of Oulu and surrounding areas, including frame transports or handling of exchange pallets depending on customer needs
Work either day or night shifts
what_we_offer: Competitive salary and bonuses according to TES
Fair and open work atmosphere, professional team support
